info.title: Layers AppView API
info.description: Decentralized linguistic annotation service built on AT Protocol. Provides XRPC query endpoints for 26 pub.layers.* record types and REST endpoints for search, cross-references, composite views, and administration.

get.summary: Get a single alignment by its AT-URI.
Get a single annotation layer by its AT-URI.
Get a single cluster set by its AT-URI.
Get a single changelog entry by its AT-URI.
List recent changelog entries across all records of a given collection type, ordered newest first.

parameters.name: collection

schema.description: The NSID of the collection to filter by (e.g., 'pub.layers.annotation.annotationLayer').

parameters.description: The NSID of the collection to filter by (e.g., 'pub.layers.annotation.annotationLayer').

get.summary: List changelog entries for a specific subject record, ordered newest first.

parameters.name: subject

schema.description: AT-URI of the subject record to list changelogs for.

parameters.description: AT-URI of the subject record to list changelogs for.

get.summary: Get a single corpus by its AT-URI.
Get a single membership by its AT-URI.
Get a single data link by its AT-URI.
Get a single eprint by its AT-URI.
Get a single expression by its AT-URI.
Get a single graph edge by its AT-URI.
Get a single graph edge set by its AT-URI.
Get a single graph node by its AT-URI.
Get a single agreement report by its AT-URI.
Get a single experiment definition by its AT-URI.
Get a single judgment set by its AT-URI.
Get a single media record by its AT-URI.
Get a single ontology by its AT-URI.
Get a single type definition by its AT-URI.
Get a single persona by its AT-URI.
Get a single resource collection by its AT-URI.
Get a single collection membership by its AT-URI.
Get a single resource entry by its AT-URI.
Get a single template filling by its AT-URI.
Get a single resource template by its AT-URI.
Get a single template composition by its AT-URI.
Get a single segmentation by its AT-URI.

kindUri.description: AT-URI of the alignment kind definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

kind.description: Alignment kind slug (fallback). The type of alignment.

subkindUri.description: AT-URI of the alignment subkind definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

subkind.description: Alignment subkind slug (fallback). More specific alignment type within the kind.

source.description: Reference to the source sequence. Use localId for within-segmentation tokenization UUID, recordRef for cross-record AT-URI (annotation layer, expression, etc.).

target.description: Reference to the target sequence. Use localId for within-segmentation tokenization UUID, recordRef for cross-record AT-URI.

sourceLang.description: BCP-47 language tag for the source (for parallel text alignment).

targetLang.description: BCP-47 language tag for the target.

knowledgeRefs.description: Knowledge graph references for this alignment (e.g., alignment model, parallel corpus source).

AlignmentAlignmentRecord.description: An alignment between two parallel sequences. The sequences can be tokenizations, annotation layers, expressions (for parallel text), or tiers. Links establish many-to-many correspondence between elements indexed by position.

expression.description: The expression this annotation layer applies to.

kindUri.description: AT-URI of the annotation kind definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

kind.description: Primary annotation kind slug (fallback when kindUri unavailable). Determines the structural interpretation of annotations in this layer.

subkindUri.description: AT-URI of the annotation subkind definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

subkind.description: Annotation subkind slug (fallback when subkindUri unavailable). The appview uses this for specialized rendering.

formalismUri.description: AT-URI of the formalism definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

formalism.description: Formalism slug (fallback when formalismUri unavailable). The linguistic formalism or annotation standard used.

sourceMethodUri.description: AT-URI of the annotation source method definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

sourceMethod.description: How this annotation layer was produced (fallback when sourceMethodUri unavailable). Follows UD's per-layer annotation source tracking.

labelSet.description: Identifier for the label set used (e.g., 'universal-pos', 'ontonotes-ner', 'penn-treebank-pos').

ontologyRef.description: Reference to a pub.layers.ontology defining the types used in this layer.

tokenizationId.description: For token-aligned layers (kind=token-tag, dependency, constituency, etc.): the tokenization these annotations are aligned to.

alternativesRef.description: Reference to the top-ranked layer in a k-best group.

parentLayerRef.description: For dependent/subordinate layers: the parent layer this one subdivides or refines. Supports ELAN-style tier dependencies, error-correction pairs, etc.

language.description: BCP-47 language tag for this annotation layer, if different from the expression's language.

AnnotationAnnotationLayerRecord.description: A named layer of annotations over an expression. All annotation types use this single record type. The combination of kind, subkind, and formalism tells the appview how to render. Multiple layers can coexist for the same expression.

expression.description: Primary expression context. Optional for cross-document clustering.

expressionRefs.description: For cross-document clustering: all expressions these clusters span.

corpusRef.description: Corpus these clusters span (for cross-document clustering).

kindUri.description: AT-URI of the clustering kind definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

kind.description: Clustering kind slug (fallback when kindUri unavailable).

layerRef.description: The annotation layer whose annotations these clusters group.

AnnotationClusterSetRecord.description: Groups annotations into equivalence classes. Used for coreference resolution (entity clusters, situation clusters), bridging anaphora grouping, and any annotation clustering task.

AnnotationDefsAnnotation.description: A single abstract annotation. The fields populated depend on the layer's kind/subkind. For token-tags: tokenIndex + label. For spans: anchor + label. For trees: anchor + label + parentId/childIds. For relations: anchor + arguments. For graphs: anchor + arguments or headIndex/targetIndex. This single type replaces the former tag, spanAnnotation, entityMention, situationMention, dependencyArc, parseNode, etc.

anchor.description: How this annotation attaches to the source data.

tokenIndex.description: For token-level annotations: 0-based index into the tokenization.

label.description: The primary label (POS tag, entity type, frame name, constituent label, dependency relation, etc.).

value.description: Secondary value (lemma form, gloss, normalized temporal value, etc.).

text.description: Surface text of the annotated span.

parentId.description: Parent annotation in tree structures (constituency, RST, etc.).

childIds.description: Child annotation UUIDs in tree structures.

headIndex.description: Head/governor token index for directed arcs (dependency parsing). -1 for root.

targetIndex.description: Dependent/target token index for directed arcs.

arguments.description: Role/argument fillers for predicate-argument structures (FrameNet, PropBank, AMR, etc.). Each argument references another annotation.

ontologyTypeRef.description: Reference to a type definition in a pub.layers.ontology.

knowledgeRefs.description: Links to external knowledge bases.

temporal.description: Structured temporal annotation. For temporal-expression, temporal-value, and temporal-vagueness subkinds. Subsumes TimeML TIMEX3 and OWL-Time GeneralDateTimeDescription.

spatial.description: Structured spatial annotation. For spatial-expression and location-mention subkinds. Subsumes ISO-Space place annotations (ISO 24617-7), SpatialML PLACE elements, and GeoJSON/WKT geometries.

features.description: Open-ended features. Use for domain-specific properties: phraseType, polarity, modality, tense, isEnhanced, morphological features, etc.

AnnotationDefsArgumentRef.description: A role/argument reference in a predicate-argument structure. Uses the composable objectRef to point to another annotation, either locally (same layer, by UUID) or remotely (cross-layer or cross-record, by AT-URI + UUID).

role.description: The argument role label (e.g., ARG0, Agent, Theme, CAUSE, connective, etc.).

target.description: Reference to the annotation filling this role. Use localId for same-layer, recordRef+objectId for cross-layer.

AnnotationDefsCluster.description: A cluster of annotations (e.g., coreferent entity mentions, situation mentions referring to the same situation).

canonicalLabel.description: The canonical/representative label for this cluster.

members.description: References to the annotations in this cluster. Use localId for same-layer members, recordRef+objectId for cross-layer or cross-document coreference.

ChangelogDefsChangeItem.description: An individual change entry. The targets field uses objectRef for machine-readable sub-record targeting, allowing a change item to point at specific objects within the subject record.

targets.description: Specific objects that changed. Uses recordRef + objectId for sub-record targeting (e.g., a specific annotation within an annotation layer).

fieldPath.description: Path to the changed field within the target (e.g., 'annotations/3/label', 'formalism', 'annotationDesign/guidelinesRef').

previousValue.description: Previous value as a display string.

newValue.description: New value as a display string.

ChangelogDefsChangeSection.description: A group of changes under a single category.

items.description: Individual change items in this section.

ChangelogDefsSemanticVersion.description: A semantic version following the major.minor.patch convention.

subject.description: AT-URI of the record this changelog describes (any pub.layers.* record).

subjectCollection.description: The NSID of the subject record's collection (e.g., 'pub.layers.annotation.annotationLayer'). Enables efficient filtering by record type without resolving the AT-URI.

createdAt.description: When this changelog entry was created.

ChangelogEntryRecord.description: A changelog entry describing changes to any Layers record.

domainUri.description: AT-URI of the domain definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

expressionCount.description: Number of expressions in the corpus.

annotationDesign.description: Annotation project design: annotator assignment, adjudication, and quality criteria.

CorpusCorpusRecord.description: A corpus: a curated collection of expressions.

CorpusDefsAdjudicationSpec.description: How disagreements between annotators are resolved into a final annotation.

methodUri.description: AT-URI of the adjudication method definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

dedicatedAdjudicator.description: Whether a separate adjudicator (not one of the annotators) resolves disagreements.

agreementThreshold.description: Agreement level (0-1000) above which adjudication is skipped.

CorpusDefsAnnotationDesign.description: Annotation project design parameters: annotator assignment, adjudication, and quality criteria.

redundancy.description: How annotators are assigned to items.

guidelinesRef.description: AT-URI of the annotation guidelines document (e.g., a pub.layers.persona or external resource).

guidelinesVersion.description: Version identifier for the annotation guidelines.

annotationRounds.description: Number of annotation passes in the project workflow.

CorpusDefsQualityCriterion.description: An acceptance criterion for annotation quality.

metricUri.description: AT-URI of the metric definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

metric.description: Agreement or quality metric (fallback when metricUri unavailable).

scopeUri.description: AT-URI of the evaluation scope definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

CorpusDefsRedundancySpec.description: How many annotators work on each item and how they are assigned.

count.description: Number of independent annotators per item.

assignmentStrategyUri.description: AT-URI of the assignment strategy definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

assignmentStrategy.description: How annotators are assigned to items (fallback when assignmentStrategyUri unavailable).

annotatorPool.description: Total number of annotators in the project.

splitUri.description: AT-URI of the split definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

metadata.description: Provenance: who assigned this expression to this corpus, when, with what tool.

features.description: Open-ended features for this membership (e.g., source file, import batch, quality flags).

CorpusMembershipMain.description: A record indicating that a expression belongs to a corpus, with optional split assignment.

splitUri.description: AT-URI of the split definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

metadata.description: Provenance: who assigned this expression to this corpus, when, with what tool.

features.description: Open-ended features for this membership (e.g., source file, import batch, quality flags).

CorpusMembershipRecord.description: A record indicating that a expression belongs to a corpus, with optional split assignment.

DefsAgentRef.description: A composable reference to any agent (human annotator, ML model, crowd worker, expert panel, etc.) that produced data. Separates the identity of the producer from the interpretive framework (persona) and the software used (tool). Consumers dispatch on which field(s) are populated: did for ATProto-native agents, id for anonymized or platform-specific identifiers, knowledgeRef for externally grounded agents (ORCID, HuggingFace model card, Wikidata).

did.description: ATProto DID of the agent, if the agent has one.

id.description: Arbitrary string identifier (anonymized crowdworker ID, platform username, model version string, etc.).

name.description: Human-readable display name for the agent.

knowledgeRef.description: External knowledge graph reference for the agent (e.g., ORCID for a human, HuggingFace model card for an ML model, Wikidata for an organization).

DefsAlignmentLink.description: A single link in an alignment between two parallel sequences. Maps element(s) in a source sequence to element(s) in a target sequence. Supports many-to-many correspondence for interlinear glossing, parallel text alignment, cross-tokenization mapping, etc.

label.description: Optional label for the alignment link (e.g., alignment type).

knowledgeRefs.description: Knowledge graph references for this link (e.g., bilingual dictionary entry, translation memory source).

DefsAnchor.description: Abstract anchor: how an annotation attaches to its source data. This is a polymorphic type; at least one anchoring field should be present. Consumers dispatch on which field(s) are populated.

textSpan.description: Character-offset span in the expression text.

pageAnchor.description: Page and region in a paged document.

externalTarget.description: External resource target (web page, document, etc.).

DefsAnnotationMetadata.description: Metadata about who or what produced an annotation, when, and with what confidence. The three key provenance fields are: agent (who did it), personaRef (under what framework), and tool (with what software).

agent.description: The agent (human or model) that produced this annotation. Distinct from personaRef (the interpretive framework) and tool (the software).

tool.description: Name or identifier of the software tool used to produce this annotation (e.g., 'spaCy 3.7', 'brat 1.3', 'ELAN 6.4'). Distinct from agent (who ran the tool).

confidence.description: Confidence score scaled 0-1000 (to avoid floats). 1000 = maximum confidence.

personaRef.description: Reference to the persona/annotation framework under which this annotation was produced. Distinct from agent (who did it).

dependencies.description: References to upstream records this annotation was derived from.

DefsBoundingBox.description: A spatial bounding box for image or video frame annotation.

x.description: X coordinate of top-left corner in pixels.

y.description: Y coordinate of top-left corner in pixels.

DefsConstraint.description: An abstract constraint expression. Used for type constraints on role slots, slot-level constraints in templates, cross-slot agreement constraints, and any other declarative restriction. The expression field holds a DSL string whose format is identified by expressionFormat/expressionFormatUri.

expressionFormatUri.description: AT-URI of the expression format definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

expressionFormat.description: Expression format slug (fallback when expressionFormatUri unavailable).

scopeUri.description: AT-URI of the scope definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

scope.description: Constraint scope slug (fallback when scopeUri unavailable).

context.description: Names of the slots or variables this constraint ranges over (for cross-slot and cross-template constraints).

DefsExternalTarget.description: Target for annotating external resources (web pages, documents, etc.). Compatible with at.margin's target model and the W3C Web Annotation Data Model.

source.description: The URI of the external resource being annotated.

sourceHash.description: SHA256 hash of normalized URI for indexing.

title.description: Title of the resource at annotation time.

selector.description: W3C selector for identifying the specific segment within the resource.

value.description: Feature value as string. Consumers may parse typed values based on the key's semantics.

DefsFeatureMap.description: An open-ended set of typed key-value features that can be attached to any annotation. Provides maximum extensibility without committing to any label set or linguistic theory.

DefsFragmentSelector.description: W3C FragmentSelector: selects by URI fragment identifier.

DefsKeyframe.description: A spatial annotation at a specific time point.

features.description: Per-keyframe features (e.g., visibility, occlusion percentage, confidence, pose data).

DefsKnowledgeRef.description: A reference to an external knowledge base entry. Supports ATProto-native KBs (e.g., chive.pub with AT-URI nodes), external KBs (e.g., Wikidata with QIDs), and user/persona-specific KBs (AT-URIs in user PDSes).

sourceUri.description: AT-URI of the knowledge base type definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

source.description: Knowledge base source slug (fallback when sourceUri unavailable).

identifier.description: The identifier within the knowledge base (e.g., Wikidata QID, chive.pub node URI, Glottolog languoid ID).

uri.description: Optional full URI for the knowledge base entry.

label.description: Human-readable label for the referenced entity.

DefsObjectRef.description: A composable reference to any Layers object, whether local (same record, by UUID), remote (different record, by AT-URI + optional object UUID), or external (knowledge graph entry). This is the universal cross-referencing primitive; consumers dispatch on which field(s) are populated. Used by argumentRef, graphNode, alignment endpoints, and any other cross-object pointer.

localId.description: UUID of an object within the same record.

recordRef.description: AT-URI of a Layers record in another user's PDS or another record in the same PDS.

objectId.description: UUID of a specific object within the record referenced by recordRef.

knowledgeRef.description: Reference to an external knowledge graph node (Wikidata, chive.pub, FrameNet, etc.).

DefsPageAnchor.description: Anchor to a specific page and region in a paged document (PDF, etc.). Compatible with chive.pub's page-level annotation model.

textSpan.description: Character offsets within the page text.

DefsSpan.description: A contiguous span of text defined by UTF-8 byte offsets.

charStart.description: Inclusive start character offset. Optional; for compatibility with character-offset datasets.

charEnd.description: Exclusive end character offset. Optional; for compatibility with character-offset datasets.

DefsSpatialEntity.description: A normalized spatial value representing a point, region, line, or complex geometry. Parallel to temporalEntity. Subsumes GeoJSON geometry types, WKT primitives, and ISO 19107 spatial schema. Consumers dispatch on which fields are populated: bbox only (pixel bounding box), geometry+type (parsed geometry string), geometry+geometryFormat (format-specific parsing).

bbox.description: Structured pixel bounding box (axis-aligned rectangle). The most common case for image/video annotation.

geometry.description: Geometry as a string in the format specified by geometryFormat. WKT examples: 'POINT(37.7749 -122.4194)', 'POLYGON((0 0, 100 0, 100 100, 0 100, 0 0))'. GeoJSON example: '{"type":"Point","coordinates":[-122.4194,37.7749]}'. SVG path example: 'M 10 10 L 100 10 L 100 100 Z'. Default format is WKT.

typeUri.description: AT-URI of the geometry type definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

type.description: Geometry type slug (fallback when typeUri unavailable). For dispatch without parsing the geometry string.

geometryFormatUri.description: AT-URI of the geometry format definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

geometryFormat.description: Format of the geometry string (fallback when geometryFormatUri unavailable). Default is WKT.

crsUri.description: AT-URI of the coordinate reference system definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

crs.description: Coordinate reference system slug (fallback when crsUri unavailable). Determines how coordinates in geometry/bbox are interpreted.

dimensions.description: Number of coordinate dimensions (2 for planar, 3 for volumetric/elevation).

uncertainty.description: Spatial precision or uncertainty radius as a string with units (e.g., '50m', '10px', '0.001deg'). Units depend on the CRS.

DefsSpatialExpression.description: A complete spatial annotation packaging the expression type, normalized value, modifier, anchoring, and document function. Parallel to temporalExpression. Subsumes ISO-Space place annotations (ISO 24617-7), SpatialML PLACE elements, and general spatial semantic annotation. Attach to annotation objects via the spatial field.

typeUri.description: AT-URI of the spatial expression type definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

type.description: Spatial expression type slug (fallback when typeUri unavailable). Maps to ISO-Space spatial entity types.

anchorRef.description: What this spatial expression is relative to (e.g., a landmark annotation, a reference location, a trajector). For relative spatial expressions like 'behind the building'.

functionUri.description: AT-URI of the document function definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

function.description: Document function slug (fallback when functionUri unavailable). What role this place plays in the document.

DefsSpatialModifier.description: Qualitative modification of a spatial value. Parallel to temporalModifier. Indicates precision, derivation method, or processing applied to a spatial entity.

modUri.description: AT-URI of the spatial modifier definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

mod.description: Spatial modifier slug (fallback when modUri unavailable).

DefsSpatioTemporalAnchor.description: Combined spatial and temporal anchor for video annotation with keyframe-based tracking.

keyframes.description: Keyframes defining spatial positions at specific times.

interpolationUri.description: AT-URI of the interpolation mode definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

interpolation.description: Interpolation mode slug (fallback when interpolationUri unavailable).

DefsTemporalEntity.description: A normalized temporal value representing a point, interval, duration, or uncertain range in calendar/clock time. Subsumes OWL-Time TemporalEntity (Instant, Interval, Duration) and TimeML TIMEX3 value. Consumers dispatch on which fields are populated: instant only (point), intervalStart+intervalEnd (bounded interval), duration only (pure duration), earliest+latest (uncertain bounds), recurrence (repeating pattern).

instant.description: Point in time as ISO 8601 datetime (e.g., '2024-03-15', '2024-03-15T14:30:00Z'). Maps to OWL-Time Instant.

intervalStart.description: Interval start as ISO 8601 datetime. Maps to OWL-Time hasBeginning.

intervalEnd.description: Interval end as ISO 8601 datetime. Maps to OWL-Time hasEnd.

duration.description: Duration as ISO 8601 duration (e.g., 'P3Y', 'PT2H30M', 'P1DT12H'). Maps to OWL-Time hasTemporalDuration.

earliest.description: Lower bound for uncertain or vague times, as ISO 8601 datetime.

latest.description: Upper bound for uncertain or vague times, as ISO 8601 datetime.

granularityUri.description: AT-URI of the granularity definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

granularity.description: Temporal granularity slug (fallback when granularityUri unavailable). Maps to OWL-Time unitType.

calendarUri.description: AT-URI of the calendar system definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

calendar.description: Calendar system slug (fallback when calendarUri unavailable). Maps to OWL-Time TRS (Temporal Reference System).

recurrence.description: ISO 8601 repeating interval (e.g., 'R/P1W' for weekly, 'R5/P1D' for 5 daily repetitions).

DefsTemporalExpression.description: A complete temporal annotation packaging the expression type, normalized value, modifier, anchoring, and document function. Subsumes TimeML TIMEX3 and OWL-Time GeneralDateTimeDescription. Attach to annotation objects via the temporal field.

typeUri.description: AT-URI of the temporal expression type definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

type.description: Temporal expression type slug (fallback when typeUri unavailable). Maps to TimeML TIMEX3 type.

anchorRef.description: What this temporal expression is relative to (e.g., document creation time, another temporal expression, a situation). Maps to TimeML anchorTimeID.

functionUri.description: AT-URI of the document function definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

function.description: Document function slug (fallback when functionUri unavailable). Maps to TimeML functionInDocument.

DefsTemporalModifier.description: Qualitative modification of a temporal value. Subsumes TimeML TIMEX3 mod attribute and OWL-Time DateTimeDescription qualifiers.

modUri.description: AT-URI of the temporal modifier definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

mod.description: Temporal modifier slug (fallback when modUri unavailable). Maps to TimeML TIMEX3 mod.

DefsTemporalSpan.description: A temporal span within a media source, defined by start and end times in milliseconds.

DefsTextPositionSelector.description: W3C TextPositionSelector adapted for ATProto: selects by UTF-8 byte offsets. Semantically equivalent to pub.layers.defs#span but named for W3C compatibility with at.margin.

charStart.description: Starting character position (0-indexed, inclusive). Optional; for compatibility with character-offset datasets.

charEnd.description: Ending character position (exclusive). Optional; for compatibility with character-offset datasets.

DefsTextQuoteSelector.description: W3C TextQuoteSelector: selects text by quoting it with surrounding context. Compatible with at.margin.annotation and the W3C Web Annotation Data Model.

DefsTokenRef.description: A reference to a specific token within a tokenization, by index.

tokenizationId.description: UUID of the tokenization containing the referenced token.

tokenIndex.description: 0-based index of the token within its tokenization.

DefsTokenRefSequence.description: A sequence of token references, possibly non-contiguous, within a single tokenization.

tokenizationId.description: UUID of the tokenization containing the referenced tokens.

anchorTokenIndex.description: Optional head/anchor token index within the sequence.

DefsUuid.description: A universally unique identifier for cross-referencing annotation objects.

eprintUri.description: AT-URI of the eprint on its publication platform.

eprintDid.description: DID of the eprint author/owner on the publication platform.

dataKindUri.description: AT-URI of the data kind definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

dataKind.description: Data kind slug (fallback when dataKindUri unavailable).

paperSection.description: Which section of the paper this data corresponds to (e.g., 'Section 4.2', 'Table 3', 'Appendix A').

EprintDataLinkRecord.description: A link from an eprint to the Layers data it produced or is associated with. Generalizes the former chive-specific eprintDataLink.

EprintDefsReproducibilityInfo.description: Information about how to reproduce the data from the eprint.

environment.description: Environment specification (Docker image, conda env, etc.).

eprintIdentifier.description: The eprint identifier (DOI, arXiv ID, ACL Anthology ID, etc.).

eprintIdentifierTypeUri.description: AT-URI of the identifier type definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

eprintIdentifierType.description: Identifier type slug (fallback when eprintIdentifierTypeUri unavailable).

platformEprintRef.description: AT-URI of the eprint record on its publication platform (e.g., chive.pub, any ATProto-native publication service).

linkTypeUri.description: AT-URI of the link type definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

linkType.description: Link type slug (fallback when linkTypeUri unavailable).

expressionRefs.description: References to Layers expressions linked to this eprint.

annotationRefs.description: References to specific annotation records linked to this eprint.

knowledgeRefs.description: Knowledge graph references (e.g., Wikidata for the venue, DBLP, Semantic Scholar corpus ID).

EprintEprintRecord.description: A link between a Layers data record and an eprint.

id.description: A corpus-level unique identifier (headline, URL, document ID, etc.).

kindUri.description: AT-URI of the expression kind definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

kind.description: Expression kind slug (fallback when kindUri unavailable).

text.description: The full raw text of the expression. All byte-offset spans reference this string.

parentRef.description: Reference to the parent Expression this one is nested within. Absent for top-level expressions (documents, recordings, etc.).

anchor.description: How this expression attaches to its parent (character span, temporal span, etc.).

mediaRef.description: Reference to an associated media record (audio, video, image).

language.description: BCP-47 language tag for the primary language.

languages.description: Additional BCP-47 tags for multilingual or code-switching expressions.

sourceUrl.description: URL of the external web resource this expression was derived from or annotates. The appview indexes this field to discover co-located annotations from other ATProto apps.

sourceRef.description: AT-URI of an external ATProto record this expression is derived from or annotates (e.g., a standard.site Leaflet post, a com.whtwnd blog entry, an app.bsky.feed.post, an at.margin.bookmark).

eprintRef.description: Reference to an eprint record that this expression is associated with.

knowledgeRefs.description: References to knowledge base entries relevant to this expression.

ExpressionExpressionRecord.description: An expression record representing a linguistic data source or unit at any granularity, from full documents down to individual morphemes.

GraphDefsGraphEdgeEntry.description: A single directed edge entry within a graphEdgeSet.

edgeTypeUri.description: AT-URI of the edge type definition node. Overrides the set-level edgeType.

edgeType.description: Edge type slug. Overrides the set-level edgeType if different.

source.description: Source node: use localId for same-record UUID, recordRef for cross-record AT-URI, knowledgeRef for external KG.

target.description: Target node: use localId for same-record UUID, recordRef for cross-record AT-URI, knowledgeRef for external KG.

edgeTypeUri.description: AT-URI of the edge type definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

edgeType.description: Edge type slug (fallback when edgeTypeUri unavailable).

ordinal.description: Optional ordering among edges of the same type.

GraphGraphEdgeRecord.description: A single directed typed edge between any two Layers objects. Supports multidigraphs and cycles. Source and target use objectRef, which can point to local UUIDs, remote AT-URIs, or external knowledge graph nodes.

edgeTypeUri.description: AT-URI of the edge type definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

edgeType.description: Edge type slug shared by all edges in this set (fallback when edgeTypeUri unavailable).

knowledgeRefs.description: Knowledge graph references for this edge set (e.g., the relation ontology it implements, source methodology).

features.description: Open-ended features (e.g., extraction method, model version, confidence threshold).

GraphGraphEdgeSetRecord.description: A batch of typed, directed edges between Layers objects. Use for bulk edge creation when many edges share the same provenance and context.

nodeTypeUri.description: AT-URI of the node type definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

nodeType.description: Node type slug (fallback when nodeTypeUri unavailable).

knowledgeRefs.description: Knowledge graph references grounding this node (Wikidata, chive.pub, FrameNet, etc.).

GraphGraphNodeRecord.description: A standalone node in the property graph. Represents entities, concepts, situations, claims, or any domain object that does not have another Layers record. Existing Layers records (expressions, annotations, typeDefs) are implicitly nodes via objectRef.

metricUri.description: AT-URI of the metric definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

JudgmentAgreementReportRecord.description: An inter-annotator agreement report summarizing agreement metrics across judgment sets.

JudgmentDefsExperimentDesign.description: Experiment design parameters for item distribution, ordering, and timing.

listConstraints.description: Constraints on item list construction (Latin square balancing, no-adjacent-same-condition, etc.).

distributionStrategyUri.description: AT-URI of the distribution strategy definition node. Community-expandable.

distributionStrategy.description: How items are distributed to annotators.

itemOrderUri.description: AT-URI of the item order definition node. Community-expandable.

itemOrder.description: How items are ordered within a list.

timingMs.description: Target timing per item in milliseconds.

JudgmentDefsJudgment.description: A single judgment about a linguistic item.

item.description: Reference to the item being judged. Use recordRef for the communication/annotation record, objectId for a specific object within it, localId for same-record references.

fillingRef.description: Reference to the pub.layers.resource#filling that generated the item being judged.

scalarValue.description: Numeric response value (ordinal-scale rating, magnitude estimate, or rank position).

textSpan.description: Selected text span for span-labeling tasks.

behavioralData.description: Behavioral signals: mouse movements, keystroke patterns, eye tracking data, scroll events, etc.

JudgmentDefsListConstraint.description: A constraint on item list construction for an experiment.

kindUri.description: AT-URI of the constraint kind definition node. Community-expandable.

targetProperty.description: The item property this constraint operates on (e.g., 'condition', 'templateRef').

parameters.description: Constraint parameters (e.g., minimum distance, number of lists).

JudgmentDefsPresentationSpec.description: How stimuli are displayed to participants.

methodUri.description: AT-URI of the presentation method definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

chunkingUnit.description: How text is segmented for incremental presentation.

cumulative.description: Whether previous chunks remain visible during incremental presentation.

JudgmentDefsRecordingMethod.description: A data capture instrument used in an experiment.

methodUri.description: AT-URI of the recording method definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

measureTypeUri.description: AT-URI of the measure type definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

measureType.description: What property or behavior is being measured (fallback when measureTypeUri unavailable).

taskTypeUri.description: AT-URI of the response instrument definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

taskType.description: Response instrument: how the response is collected (fallback when taskTypeUri unavailable).

templateRefs.description: References to pub.layers.resource#template records used to generate stimuli for this experiment.

collectionRefs.description: References to pub.layers.resource#collection records providing filler pools for this experiment.

scaleMin.description: Minimum scale value for ordinal-scale judgments.

knowledgeRefs.description: Knowledge graph references (e.g., theoretical framework, methodology citation, task ontology).

presentation.description: How stimuli are displayed to participants.

recordingMethods.description: Data capture instruments used in this experiment.

design.description: Experiment design parameters: list constraints, distribution strategy, item order.

JudgmentExperimentDefRecord.description: Definition of an annotation or judgment experiment.

agent.description: The agent (human annotator, ML model, crowd worker, etc.) who produced this judgment set. Use did for ATProto-native annotators, id for anonymized/platform-specific identifiers, knowledgeRef for ORCID or model cards.

knowledgeRefs.description: Knowledge graph references (e.g., crowdsourcing platform, annotator population, methodology source).

features.description: Open-ended features (e.g., annotator demographics, session metadata, completion time, payment info).

JudgmentJudgmentSetRecord.description: A set of judgments from a single annotator for an experiment.

MediaDefsAudioInfo.description: Composable audio metadata. Attach to any media record representing audio content: standalone audio files, audio tracks in video, etc.

bitRate.description: Audio bitrate in bits per second.

numberOfSamples.description: Total number of audio samples. Enables sample-accurate alignment.

speakerCount.description: Number of distinct speakers (for spoken language data).

transcriptRef.description: AT-URI of a pub.layers.expression containing the transcript.

segmentationRef.description: AT-URI of a pub.layers.segmentation record structuring the transcript.

MediaDefsDocumentInfo.description: Composable document/image metadata. Attach to any media record representing scanned documents, manuscripts, printed text, or other page-based media for OCR/HTR annotation workflows.

dpi.description: Scanning resolution in dots per inch (300+ recommended for OCR).

pageCount.description: Number of pages in the document.

MediaDefsVideoInfo.description: Composable video metadata. Attach to any media record representing video content.

frameRate.description: Frame rate scaled by 100 (e.g., 2997 = 29.97fps). Avoids floats.

bitRate.description: Video bitrate in bits per second.

scanType.description: Scan type. Affects frame extraction for annotation.

kindUri.description: AT-URI of the media kind definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

kind.description: Media kind slug (fallback when kindUri unavailable).

parentMediaRef.description: AT-URI of the parent media record this excerpt/clip was extracted from.

startOffsetMs.description: Offset in milliseconds where this excerpt starts within the parent media. Used with parentMediaRef.

audio.description: Audio-specific metadata. Present for audio files and videos with audio tracks.

video.description: Video-specific metadata. Present for video files and image sequences.

document.description: Document-specific metadata. Present for scanned documents, manuscripts, etc.

knowledgeRefs.description: Knowledge graph references.

metadata.description: Provenance: who created/uploaded this media record, with what tool.

features.description: Open-ended features: recording conditions, speaker metadata, quality metrics, consent, etc.

MediaMediaMain.description: A media source record (audio, video, image, or document) that can be referenced by expressions and annotations. Modality-specific metadata lives in composable audioInfo/videoInfo/documentInfo objects.

kindUri.description: AT-URI of the media kind definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

kind.description: Media kind slug (fallback when kindUri unavailable).

parentMediaRef.description: AT-URI of the parent media record this excerpt/clip was extracted from.

startOffsetMs.description: Offset in milliseconds where this excerpt starts within the parent media. Used with parentMediaRef.

audio.description: Audio-specific metadata. Present for audio files and videos with audio tracks.

video.description: Video-specific metadata. Present for video files and image sequences.

document.description: Document-specific metadata. Present for scanned documents, manuscripts, etc.

knowledgeRefs.description: Knowledge graph references.

metadata.description: Provenance: who created/uploaded this media record, with what tool.

features.description: Open-ended features: recording conditions, speaker metadata, quality metrics, consent, etc.

MediaMediaRecord.description: A media source record (audio, video, image, or document) that can be referenced by expressions and annotations. Modality-specific metadata lives in composable audioInfo/videoInfo/documentInfo objects.

OntologyDefsRoleSlot.description: A role/argument slot in a frame or situation type definition. Structurally parallel to pub.layers.resource#slot: both represent named positions with type constraints. roleSlot is ontology-level (what roles a frame type allows); resource slot is template-level (what variables a template exposes).

roleName.description: The role label (e.g., Agent, Patient, Theme, ARG0).

fillerTypeRefs.description: References to allowed filler types (pub.layers.ontology#typeDef AT-URIs).

collectionRef.description: AT-URI of a pub.layers.resource#collection constraining allowed fillers.

defaultValue.description: Default filler value if not explicitly filled.

constraints.description: Declarative constraints on fillers of this role (e.g., selectional restrictions, agreement requirements).

features.description: Open-ended features for this role slot (e.g., semantic type, animacy preference, optionality conditions).

description.description: Detailed description of the ontology's purpose and scope.

domainUri.description: AT-URI of the domain definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

parentRef.description: Reference to a parent ontology this one extends.

personaRef.description: Reference to the persona that created/owns this ontology.

knowledgeRefs.description: Knowledge graph references grounding this ontology.

OntologyOntologyMain.description: An annotation ontology: a collection of typed definitions (entity types, situation types, role types, relation types) that together form a complete annotation framework.

description.description: Detailed description of the ontology's purpose and scope.

domainUri.description: AT-URI of the domain definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

parentRef.description: Reference to a parent ontology this one extends.

personaRef.description: Reference to the persona that created/owns this ontology.

knowledgeRefs.description: Knowledge graph references grounding this ontology.

OntologyOntologyRecord.description: An annotation ontology: a collection of typed definitions (entity types, situation types, role types, relation types) that together form a complete annotation framework.

ontologyRef.description: The ontology this type belongs to.

typeKindUri.description: AT-URI of the type kind definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

typeKind.description: Type kind slug (fallback when typeKindUri unavailable).

gloss.description: Rich text definition/gloss of this type. May include references to other types and Wikidata entities, following FOVEA conventions.

parentTypeRef.description: Reference to a parent type (for type hierarchies/inheritance).

allowedRoles.description: For frame/situation types: the roles that can be filled.

allowedValues.description: For attribute types: enumerated allowed values.

knowledgeRefs.description: Knowledge graph groundings (Wikidata, chive.pub, FrameNet, etc.).

OntologyTypeDefMain.description: A type definition within an ontology. Covers entity types, situation types, role types, and relation types in a single unified model.

ontologyRef.description: The ontology this type belongs to.

typeKindUri.description: AT-URI of the type kind definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

typeKind.description: Type kind slug (fallback when typeKindUri unavailable).

gloss.description: Rich text definition/gloss of this type. May include references to other types and Wikidata entities, following FOVEA conventions.

parentTypeRef.description: Reference to a parent type (for type hierarchies/inheritance).

allowedRoles.description: For frame/situation types: the roles that can be filled.

allowedValues.description: For attribute types: enumerated allowed values.

knowledgeRefs.description: Knowledge graph groundings (Wikidata, chive.pub, FrameNet, etc.).

OntologyTypeDefRecord.description: A type definition within an ontology. Covers entity types, situation types, role types, and relation types in a single unified model.

name.description: The persona name (e.g., 'Syntactician', 'Intelligence Analyst', 'Biomedical NER Annotator').

description.description: Description of the persona's role, expertise, and information needs.

domainUri.description: AT-URI of the domain definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

kindUri.description: AT-URI of the persona kind definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

kind.description: Persona kind slug (fallback when kindUri unavailable).

parentRef.description: AT-URI of a parent persona this one specializes (e.g., 'Biomedical NER Annotator' specializes 'NER Annotator').

ontologyRefs.description: Ontologies this persona uses for annotation.

knowledgeRefs.description: Knowledge graph references (e.g., ORCID, institutional identifiers, Wikidata for organizations).

features.description: Open-ended features: expertise level, certification, language proficiency, inter-annotator reliability, etc.

PersonaPersonaMain.description: A persona representing an annotator's role, expertise, and interpretive framework.

name.description: The persona name (e.g., 'Syntactician', 'Intelligence Analyst', 'Biomedical NER Annotator').

description.description: Description of the persona's role, expertise, and information needs.

domainUri.description: AT-URI of the domain definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

kindUri.description: AT-URI of the persona kind definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

kind.description: Persona kind slug (fallback when kindUri unavailable).

parentRef.description: AT-URI of a parent persona this one specializes (e.g., 'Biomedical NER Annotator' specializes 'NER Annotator').

ontologyRefs.description: Ontologies this persona uses for annotation.

knowledgeRefs.description: Knowledge graph references (e.g., ORCID, institutional identifiers, Wikidata for organizations).

features.description: Open-ended features: expertise level, certification, language proficiency, inter-annotator reliability, etc.

PersonaPersonaRecord.description: A persona representing an annotator's role, expertise, and interpretive framework.

ordinal.description: Optional ordering position within the collection.

metadata.description: Provenance: who added this entry to this collection, when, with what tool.

ResourceCollectionMembershipRecord.description: Links an entry to a collection. Separate record enables many-to-many relationships (an entry can belong to multiple collections) and decentralized curation (anyone can propose membership).

kindUri.description: AT-URI of the collection kind definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

kind.description: Collection kind slug (fallback when kindUri unavailable).

ontologyRef.description: Reference to a pub.layers.ontology defining the type system for entries in this collection.

metadata.description: Provenance: who curated this collection, with what tool.

ResourceCollectionRecord.description: A named collection of linguistic resource entries. Abstract enough to represent bead Lexicons, FrameNet frame inventories, PropBank frame files, WordNet synsets, morphological paradigm tables, gazetteers, stop-word lists, etc.

ResourceDefsMweComponent.description: A component of a multi-word expression entry.

isHead.description: Whether this component is the head of the MWE.

ResourceDefsSlot.description: A named variable slot in a template. Generalizes bead's Slot (template variable position with constraints and defaults), ontology roleSlots (argument positions with filler type constraints), and similar parameterized positions in any structured linguistic pattern. Slots are composable: they can reference collections of allowed fillers, ontology types, or express arbitrary constraints.

name.description: Slot name (used as placeholder key in template text, e.g., 'subject', 'verb', 'arg0').

required.description: Whether this slot must be filled.

defaultValue.description: Default filler value if not explicitly filled.

collectionRef.description: AT-URI of a resource collection constraining allowed fillers.

ontologyTypeRef.description: AT-URI of a pub.layers.ontology#typeDef constraining the filler type.

fillerTypeRefs.description: Multiple allowed filler type references (disjunctive constraint).

ResourceDefsSlotFilling.description: A single slot→filler mapping in a filled template. The filler can be an entry reference (AT-URI to a resource entry), a literal value, or both (entry reference with rendered surface form).

slotName.description: Name of the slot being filled (must match a slot name in the template).

entryRef.description: AT-URI of the resource entry filling this slot.

literalValue.description: Literal string value for this slot (used when no entry reference is needed, or as override).

renderedForm.description: The surface form as rendered in the filled text (may differ from entry form due to morphological inflection, agreement, etc.).

ResourceDefsTemplateMember.description: A member in a template composition. References either a template or a nested composition.

compositionRef.description: AT-URI of a nested templateComposition (for tree structures).

ontologyTypeRef.description: Reference to a pub.layers.ontology#typeDef classifying this entry.

knowledgeRefs.description: Knowledge graph groundings (WordNet synset, FrameNet lexical unit, Wikidata, etc.).

features.description: Open-ended features: pos, morphological features, frequency, register, etc.

components.description: For multi-word expressions: the component words.

mweKindUri.description: AT-URI of the MWE kind definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

mweKind.description: MWE kind slug (fallback when mweKindUri unavailable).

sourceRef.description: AT-URI of the source record this entry was derived from (e.g., an annotation, another entry).

metadata.description: Provenance: who created this entry, with what tool, under what persona.

ResourceEntryRecord.description: A linguistic resource entry: a lexical item, frame element filler, morphological paradigm cell, or any atomic unit in a structured linguistic collection. Abstract enough to represent bead LexicalItems, FrameNet lexical units, PropBank rolesets, WordNet synset members, morphological paradigm cells, etc.

templateRef.description: AT-URI of the template being filled.

renderedText.description: The fully rendered text after substitution.

expressionRef.description: AT-URI of the pub.layers.expression materializing this filling (for annotation).

strategyUri.description: AT-URI of the filling strategy definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

strategy.description: Filling strategy slug (fallback when strategyUri unavailable).

metadata.description: Provenance: what tool/process generated this filling.

knowledgeRefs.description: Knowledge graph references (e.g., generation model in a KB, sampling distribution, linguistic theory motivating the filling).

features.description: Open-ended features: model name for MLM filling, seed for random, solver stats for CSP, etc.

ResourceFillingRecord.description: A filled template: a template with all slots mapped to specific fillers, producing a rendered text. Generalizes bead's FilledTemplate and Item. The rendered text can optionally be materialized as a pub.layers.expression for annotation. Fillings are composable: they reference templates, entries, and communications via AT-URIs.

compositionTypeUri.description: AT-URI of the composition type definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

compositionType.description: Composition type slug (fallback when compositionTypeUri unavailable).

experimentRef.description: Reference to the experiment this composition was designed for.

ResourceTemplateCompositionMain.description: A composition of templates (sequence, tree, or other structure). Used for multi-part stimuli, template hierarchies, and complex item construction.

compositionTypeUri.description: AT-URI of the composition type definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

compositionType.description: Composition type slug (fallback when compositionTypeUri unavailable).

experimentRef.description: Reference to the experiment this composition was designed for.

ResourceTemplateCompositionRecord.description: A composition of templates (sequence, tree, or other structure). Used for multi-part stimuli, template hierarchies, and complex item construction.

slots.description: The named slots in this template.

constraints.description: Cross-slot constraints (e.g., agreement, semantic compatibility). These apply across multiple slots in this template.

ontologyRef.description: Reference to the ontology defining the type system used by this template.

experimentRef.description: Reference to the experiment this template was designed for.

metadata.description: Provenance: who designed this template, with what tool.

features.description: Open-ended features: measureType, taskType, category, domain, etc.

ResourceTemplateMain.description: A parameterized text template with named variable slots. Generalizes bead's Template (text pattern with {slotName} placeholders, slot definitions, and cross-slot constraints) and similar pattern structures used for stimulus generation, item construction, data augmentation, and controlled natural language. Templates are composable: they can reference ontologies, collections, and other templates.

slots.description: The named slots in this template.

constraints.description: Cross-slot constraints (e.g., agreement, semantic compatibility). These apply across multiple slots in this template.

ontologyRef.description: Reference to the ontology defining the type system used by this template.

experimentRef.description: Reference to the experiment this template was designed for.

metadata.description: Provenance: who designed this template, with what tool.

features.description: Open-ended features: measureType, taskType, category, domain, etc.

ResourceTemplateRecord.description: A parameterized text template with named variable slots. Generalizes bead's Template (text pattern with {slotName} placeholders, slot definitions, and cross-slot constraints) and similar pattern structures used for stimulus generation, item construction, data augmentation, and controlled natural language. Templates are composable: they can reference ontologies, collections, and other templates.

SegmentationDefsToken.description: A single token within a tokenization.

tokenIndex.description: Position of this token in the tokenization (0-based).

text.description: The surface form of the token.

textSpan.description: UTF-8 byte offsets into the expression text.

SegmentationDefsTokenization.description: An ordered sequence of tokens for an expression or sub-expression. Multiple tokenizations can coexist for the same expression (e.g., whitespace vs. BPE vs. morphological), enabling interlinear glossing, alternative segmentation strategies, or multi-granularity analysis.

kindUri.description: AT-URI of the tokenization kind definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

kind.description: Tokenization kind slug (fallback when kindUri unavailable).

expressionRef.description: Reference to the specific sub-expression this tokenization covers (e.g., a sentence-level expression). If absent, covers the entire expression referenced by the segmentation record.

expression.description: Reference to the expression this segmentation applies to.

tokenizations.description: The tokenizations in this segmentation. Each tokenization can optionally scope to a sub-expression via expressionRef.

knowledgeRefs.description: Knowledge graph references (e.g., tokenizer algorithm, sentence splitting model).

features.description: Open-ended features (e.g., tokenizer version, parameters, language model used).

SegmentationSegmentationMain.description: A segmentation of an expression into tokenizations. Structural hierarchy (sections, sentences, paragraphs) is expressed via expression records with parentRef; this record provides the token-level decomposition.

expression.description: Reference to the expression this segmentation applies to.

tokenizations.description: The tokenizations in this segmentation. Each tokenization can optionally scope to a sub-expression via expressionRef.

knowledgeRefs.description: Knowledge graph references (e.g., tokenizer algorithm, sentence splitting model).

features.description: Open-ended features (e.g., tokenizer version, parameters, language model used).

SegmentationSegmentationRecord.description: A segmentation of an expression into tokenizations. Structural hierarchy (sections, sentences, paragraphs) is expressed via expression records with parentRef; this record provides the token-level decomposition.
